summary: Frontend testing blocked by critical authentication issues. Backend APIs working (83.3% success rate) but frontend login/session management is broken, preventing access to Ativações page and ICCID input testing.

ui_bugs.issue: Login appears successful but session is not maintained - user gets redirected back to login
Cannot access Ativações page due to authentication loop

integration_issues.issue: Login succeeds (200 OK) but /api/auth/me returns 401, causing redirect loop
Cannot test ICCID functionality because Ativações page is inaccessible

passed_tests: Frontend application loads and displays login form
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix authentication session management. Login endpoint works but /api/auth/me returns 401 immediately after login, preventing access to any protected routes. Check: 1) Cookie/session configuration, 2) CORS settings for credentials, 3) Backend session storage/validation logic. Cannot test ICCID input functionality until authentication is fixed.
